    descriptionLand on upgrade station and talk to Osho, the lead engineer.
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionOsho could not thank us enough and told us that he is experimenting on a new weapon that will help them in their defense and he wants to share this technology with us. But they need some expert help in bio energy readings and asked if we can take some readings and travel to Ono, in the Kritillian sector. She have the knowledge to finish their new weapon.
